prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `3ad05f52`.
codex_response:
The rule is: the non-`8` seed color propagates through the wall-bounded room/corridor network and its door gaps, while exterior background stays unchanged. I used the `arc2_opus46_summary.json` hint as the starting point, but corrected it to avoid a naive non-`8` flood fill that leaks around wall endpoints; that note is in [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_3ad05f52/notes.md).

The task package is in [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_3ad05f52/__init__.py), [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_3ad05f52/verifier.py), and [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_3ad05f52/generator.py). The generator stays in-family by building irregular `8`-walled room trees with one-cell door openings and seeded rooms, and no new primitive was added.

Verification passed on the official examples (`4/4`) and on generated data (`1000/1000`). Artifacts are at [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/3ad05f52/task.json), [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/3ad05f52/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/3ad05f52/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/3ad05f52/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/3ad05f52/previews/preview_03.png).
